questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家社交媒体公司希望将其用户配置文件、关系和交互的数据库存储在 AWS 云中。该公司需要一个应用程序来监视数据库中的任何更改。应用程序需要分析数据实体之间的关系并向用户提供建议。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A social media company wants to store its database of user profiles, relationships, and interactions in the AWS Cloud. The company needs an application to monitor any changes in the database. The application needs to analyze the relationships between the data entities and to provide recommendations to users. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Neptune 存储信息。使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 处理数据库中的更改。
A.en: Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process changes in the database.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Neptune 存储信息。使用 Neptune Streams 处理数据库中的更改。
B.en: Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Quantum Ledger 数据库 (Amazon QLDB) 存储信息。使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 处理数据库中的更改。
C.en: Use Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) to store the information. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process changes in the database.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Quantum Ledger 数据库 (Amazon QLDB) 存储信息。使用 Neptune Streams 处理数据库中的更改。
D.en: Use Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Kinesis 需要额外的配置和管理，并且不是最低运营开销的解决方案。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Kinesis requires additional configuration and management and is not the lowest operational overhead solution.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该选项完全满足题目要求，并且运行开销最低。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option fully meets the question requirements and has the lowest running overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： QLDB不适合存储用户关系和交互数据， Kinesis增加了运营开销。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: QLDB is not suitable for storing user relationship and interaction data, and Kinesis increases operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这个选项在技术上不可行，也不符合问题的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is not technically feasible and does not meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon Neptune 存储信息。使用 Neptune Streams 处理数据库中的更改。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (88%) 12%。热门讨论与考点摘要：该选项完全满足题目要求，并且运行开销最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (88%) 12%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This option fully meets the question requirements and has the lowest running overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在创建一个将存储大量数据的新应用程序。数据将每小时进行一次分析，并由跨多个可用区部署的多个 Amazon EC2 Linux 实例进行修改。未来 6 个月所需的存储空间量将继续增长。解决方案架构师应该推荐哪种存储解决方案来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is creating a new application that will store a large amount of data. The data will be analyzed hourly and will be modified by several Amazon EC2 Linux instances that are deployed across multiple Availability Zones. The needed amount of storage space will continue to grow for the next 6 months. Which storage solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将数据存储在 Amazon S3 Glacier 中。更新 S3 Glacier 文件库策略以允许访问应用程序实例。
A.en: Store the data in Amazon S3 Glacier. Update the S3 Glacier vault policy to allow access to the application instances.

B.zh: 将数据存储在 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷中。在应用程序实例上挂载 EBS 卷。
B.en: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume on the application instances.

C.zh: 将数据存储在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统中。在应用程序实例上挂载文件系统。
C.en: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the file system on the application instances.

D.zh: 将数据存储在应用程序实例之间共享的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 预置 IOPS 卷中。
D.en: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS volume shared between the application instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 Glacier 主要用于长期存储和返回数据。访问时延较高，不适合频繁分析和修改数据的场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 Glacier is primarily used for long-term storage and return of data. Access latency is high and is not suitable for scenarios where data is frequently analyzed and modified.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon EBS 卷通常只能安装到单个 EC2 实例。虽然它们可以通过特定配置支持多实例共享，但不适合跨多个可用区的场景。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS volumes can typically only be mounted to a single EC2 instance. Although they can support multi-instance sharing through specific configurations, they are not suitable for scenarios across multiple Availability Zones.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon EFS 支持跨多个 EC2 实例共享文件系统，并支持多可用区部署，可以满足频繁的数据分析和修改的需求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon EFS supports shared file systems across multiple EC2 instances and supports multi-availability zone deployment, which can meet the needs of frequent data analysis and modification.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然预配置的 IOPS EBS 卷可以提供高性能，但 EBS 卷的共享功能有限，并且不支持跨多个可用区的场景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although provisioned IOPS EBS volumes can provide high performance, EBS volumes have limited sharing capabilities and do not support scenarios across multiple Availability Zones.

answer_text.zh: C. 将数据存储在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统中。在应用程序实例上挂载文件系统。
answer_text.en: C. Store the data in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the file system on the application instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon EFS 支持跨多个 EC2 实例共享文件系统，并支持多可用区部署，可以满足频繁的数据分析和修改的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EFS supports shared file systems across multiple EC2 instances and supports multi-availability zone deployment, which can meet the needs of frequent data analysis and modification.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司管理一个在 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 多可用区数据库实例上存储数据的应用程序。流量的增加导致性能问题。该公司确定数据库查询是性能缓慢的主要原因。解决方案架构师应该做什么来提高应用程序的性能？
question_text.en: A company manages an application that stores data on an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL Multi-AZ DB instance. Increases in traffic are causing performance problems. The company determines that database queries are the primary reason for the slow performance. What should a solutions architect do to improve the application's performance?

A.zh: 提供来自多可用区备用副本的读取流量。
A.en: Serve read traffic from the Multi-AZ standby replica.

B.zh: 配置数据库实例以使用传输加速。
B.en: Configure the DB instance to use Transfer Acceleration.

C.zh: 从源数据库实例创建只读副本。提供来自只读副本的读取流量。
C.en: Create a read replica from the source DB instance. Serve read traffic from the read replica.

D.zh: 在应用程序和 Amazon RDS 之间使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 来提高数据库请求的并发性。
D.en: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose between the application and Amazon RDS to increase the concurrency of database requests.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：多可用区架构中的备副本仅用于故障转移，不支持直接处理读流量。多可用区的主要目的是提高可用性，而不是优化性能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The standby replica in the Multi-AZ architecture is only used for failover and does not support direct processing of read traffic. The main purpose of Multi-AZ is to improve availability, not to optimize performance.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：传输加速是用于加速跨区域数据传输的功能，与数据库性能优化无关。此选项与问题中编织的性能问题无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Transfer acceleration is a function used to accelerate cross-region data transfer and has nothing to do with database performance optimization. This option has nothing to do with the performance issues with weaving in the question.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：创建只读副本（Read Replica）可以分流主数据库的读取流量，从而提高性能。只读副本专门设计用于处理读取流量，适合解决您的问题中的性能问题。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Creating a read replica (Read Replica) can offload the read traffic of the primary database, thereby improving performance. Read replicas are specifically designed to handle read traffic and are suitable for solving the performance issues in your problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 用于数据流处理，与数据库请求的并发性没有直接关系。该选项不适合解决数据库查询引起的性能问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose is used for data stream processing and is not directly related to the concurrency of database requests. This option is not suitable for solving performance problems caused by database queries.

answer_text.zh: C. 从源数据库实例创建只读副本。提供来自只读副本的读取流量。
answer_text.en: C. Create a read replica from the source DB instance. Serve read traffic from the read replica.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：创建只读副本（Read Replica）可以分流主数据库的读取流量，从而提高性能。只读副本专门设计用于处理读取流量，适合解决您的问题中的性能问题。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Creating a read replica (Read Replica) can offload the read traffic of the primary database, thereby improving performance. Read replicas are specifically designed to handle read traffic and are suitable for solving the performance issues in your problem.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司每天从各种机器收集 10 GB 的遥测数据。该公司将数据存储在源数据账户的 Amazon S3 存储桶中。该公司已聘请多家咨询机构使用这些数据进行分析。每个机构都需要其分析师读取数据。公司必须通过选择能够最大限度提高安全性和运营效率的解决方案来共享源数据账户中的数据。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company collects 10 GB of telemetry data daily from various machines. The company stores the data in an Amazon S3 bucket in a source data account. The company has hired several consulting agencies to use this data for analysis. Each agency needs read access to the data for its analysts. The company must share the data from the source data account by choosing a solution that maximizes security and operational efficiency. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 配置 S3 全局表以复制每个机构的数据。
A.en: Configure S3 global tables to replicate data for each agency.

B.zh: 在有限时间内公开 S3 存储桶。仅通知机构。
B.en: Make the S3 bucket public for a limited time. Inform only the agencies.

C.zh: 配置 S3 存储桶对机构拥有的账户的跨账户访问。
C.en: Configure cross-account access for the S3 bucket to the accounts that the agencies own.

D.zh: 为源数据账户中的每个分析师设置一个 IAM 用户。授予每个用户对 S3 存储桶的访问权限。
D.en: Set up an IAM user for each analyst in the source data account. Grant each user access to the S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 不支持全局表功能。全局表是 Amazon DynamoDB 的一项功能，而不是 S3 的一项功能。错误：即使具有类似的复制功能，将数据复制到每个机构的账户也会增加管理复杂性，并且无法满足“最大限度地提高安全性和运营效率”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 does not support the global table feature. Global tables are a feature of Amazon DynamoDB, not S3. Wrong: Even with similar replication capabilities, replicating data to each institution's accounts would increase administrative complexity and fail to meet the requirement to "maximize security and operational efficiency."

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：公开访问 S3 存储桶会严重降低安全性，任何人都可以访问数据，而不仅仅是指定的组织。错误：即使有限的公共访问也不能保证数据的安全，并且违反了最佳实践。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Having public access to an S3 bucket severely reduces security, allowing anyone to access the data, not just designated organizations. Error: Even limited public access does not guarantee the security of data and violates best practices.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：跨账户访问允许您安全地将 S3 存储桶的访问权限授予指定账户。正确：此方法符合 AWS 最佳实践，并最大限度地提高安全性和运营效率。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cross-account access allows you to securely grant access to your S3 bucket to specified accounts. Correct: This approach complies with AWS best practices and maximizes security and operational efficiency.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：为每个分析师创建 IAM 用户会增加管理复杂性，尤其是当分析师数量较多时。错误：这种做法不符合“运营效率最大化”的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Creating IAM users for each analyst increases management complexity, especially when the number of analysts is large. Error: This approach does not meet the requirement of "maximizing operational efficiency".

answer_text.zh: C. 配置 S3 存储桶对机构拥有的账户的跨账户访问。
answer_text.en: C. Configure cross-account access for the S3 bucket to the accounts that the agencies own.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (88%) 12%。热门讨论与考点摘要：跨账户访问允许您安全地将 S3 存储桶的访问权限授予指定账户。正确：此方法符合 AWS 最佳实践，并最大限度地提高安全性和运营效率。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (88%) 12%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Cross-account access allows you to securely grant access to your S3 bucket to specified accounts. Correct: This approach complies with AWS best practices and maximizes security and operational efficiency.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在其主要 AWS 区域中使用 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 来实现 CIFS 和 NFS 文件共享。在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序访问文件共享。该公司需要在次要区域提供存储灾难恢复 (DR) 解决方案。需要使用与主 Region 相同的协议来访问辅助 Region 中复制的数据。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP in its primary AWS Region for CIFS and NFS file shares. Applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances access the file shares. The company needs a storage disaster recovery (DR) solution in a secondary Region. The data that is replicated in the secondary Region needs to be accessed by using the same protocols as the primary Region. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数以将数据复制到 Amazon S3 存储桶。将 S3 存储桶复制到辅助区域。
A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to copy the data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Replicate the S3 bucket to the secondary Region.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 创建 FSx for ONTAP 卷的备份。将卷复制到辅助区域。从备份创建新的 FSx for ONTAP 实例。
B.en: Create a backup of the FSx for ONTAP volumes by using AWS Backup. Copy the volumes to the secondary Region. Create a new FSx for ONTAP instance from the backup.

C.zh: 在次要区域中创建 FSx for ONTAP 实例。使用 NetApp SnapMirror 将数据从主要区域复制到次要区域。
C.en: Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the secondary Region. Use NetApp SnapMirror to replicate data from the primary Region to the secondary Region.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 卷。将当前数据迁移到卷。将卷复制到辅助区域。
D.en: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Migrate the current data to the volume. Replicate the volume to the secondary Region.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然S3支持跨区域复制，但S3不支持CIFS和NFS协议，无法满足问题需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although S3 supports cross-region replication, S3 does not support CIFS and NFS protocols and cannot meet the problem requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该方法需要手动创建和恢复备份，操作复杂，且不支持数据实时同步。它无法满足最低运营费用要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This method requires manual creation and restoration of backups, is complex, and does not support real-time data synchronization. It cannot meet minimum operating expense requirements.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： NetApp SnapMirror 是一款专为 FSx for ONTAP 设计的跨区域数据复制解决方案，支持 CIFS 和 NFS 协议，且运营开销极低。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: NetApp SnapMirror is a cross-region data replication solution designed for FSx for ONTAP that supports CIFS and NFS protocols with minimal operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EFS不支持CIFS协议，仅支持NFS协议，无法满足问题需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EFS does not support the CIFS protocol and only supports the NFS protocol, which cannot meet the problem requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 在次要区域中创建 FSx for ONTAP 实例。使用 NetApp SnapMirror 将数据从主要区域复制到次要区域。
answer_text.en: C. Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the secondary Region. Use NetApp SnapMirror to replicate data from the primary Region to the secondary Region.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： NetApp SnapMirror 是一款专为 FSx for ONTAP 设计的跨区域数据复制解决方案，支持 CIFS 和 NFS 协议，且运营开销极低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: NetApp SnapMirror is a cross-region data replication solution designed for FSx for ONTAP that supports CIFS and NFS protocols with minimal operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 开发团队正在创建一个使用 AWS Lambda 函数的基于事件的应用程序。将文件添加到 Amazon S3 存储桶时将生成事件。开发团队目前已将 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 配置为 Amazon S3 的事件目标。解决方案架构师应该怎样做才能以可扩展的方式处理来自 Amazon S3 的事件？
question_text.en: A development team is creating an event-based application that uses AWS Lambda functions. Events will be generated when files are added to an Amazon S3 bucket. The development team currently has Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) configured as the event target from Amazon S3. What should a solutions architect do to process the events from Amazon S3 in a scalable way?

A.zh: 创建一个 SNS 订阅，以便在事件在 Lambda 中运行之前在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 中处理该事件。
A.en: Create an SNS subscription that processes the event in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) before the event runs in Lambda.

B.zh: 创建一个 SNS 订阅，以便在事件在 Lambda 中运行之前在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 中处理该事件
B.en: Create an SNS subscription that processes the event in Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) before the event runs in Lambda

C.zh: 创建将事件发送到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 的 SNS 订阅。配置 SOS 队列以触发 Lambda 函数。
C.en: Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS). Configure the SOS queue to trigger a Lambda function.

D.zh: 创建将事件发送到 AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS) 的 SNS 订阅。配置 Lambda 函数以从 SMS 事件进行轮询。
D.en: Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS). Configure the Lambda function to poll from the SMS event.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon ECS 可以处理事件，但该问题需要“可扩展的方法”。直接使用ECS来处理事件会增加复杂性和管理负担。另外， ECS并不是事件驱动的最佳选择， Lambda更适合处理事件。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ECS can handle events, but the problem requires a "scalable approach." Using ECS ​​directly to handle events adds complexity and management burden. In addition, ECS is not the best choice for event-driven, Lambda is more suitable for processing events.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon EKS 是一种可以处理事件的容器编排服务，但它需要额外的配置和管理，从而增加了复杂性。该问题需要“可扩展的方法”，而 EKS 并不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EKS is a container orchestration service that can handle events, but it requires additional configuration and management, adding complexity. The problem requires a "scalable approach" and EKS is not the best choice.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon SQS 是一种完全托管的消息队列服务，可以与 SNS 集成以将事件存储在队列中。通过SQS触发Lambda函数，可以实现事件的异步处理，保证高扩展性和可靠性。这是AWS推荐的事件驱动架构设计模式。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queuing service that can be integrated with SNS to store events in a queue. By triggering Lambda functions through SQS, asynchronous processing of events can be achieved to ensure high scalability and reliability. This is the event-driven architecture design pattern recommended by AWS.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS) 是一项用于迁移服务器的服务，与事件处理无关。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS) is a service for migrating servers that has nothing to do with event handling. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建将事件发送到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 的 SNS 订阅。配置 SOS 队列以触发 Lambda 函数。
answer_text.en: C. Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS). Configure the SOS queue to trigger a Lambda function.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon SQS 是一种完全托管的消息队列服务，可以与 SNS 集成以将事件存储在队列中。通过SQS触发Lambda函数，可以实现事件的异步处理，保证高扩展性和可靠性。这是AWS推荐的事件驱动架构设计模式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queuing service that can be integrated with SNS to store events in a queue. By triggering Lambda functions through SQS, asynchronous processing of events can be achieved to ensure high scalability and reliability. This is the event-driven architecture design pattern recommended by AWS.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师正在设计 Amazon API Gateway 背后的新服务。服务的请求模式将是不可预测的，并且可能会突然从每秒 0 个请求变为超过 500 个请求。目前后端数据库需要持久化的数据总大小不到1GB，且未来增长不可预测。可以使用简单的键值请求来查询数据。哪种 AWS 服务组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a new service behind Amazon API Gateway. The request patterns for the service will be unpredictable and can change suddenly from 0 requests to over 500 per second. The total size of the data that needs to be persisted in a backend database is currently less than 1 GB with unpredictable future growth. Data can be queried using simple key-value requests. Which combination ofAWS services would meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS 法门
A.en: AWS Fargate

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: 亚马逊动态数据库
C.en: Amazon DynamoDB

D.zh: 亚马逊 EC2 Auto Scaling
D.en: Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling

E.zh: 兼容 MySQL 的 Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 AWS Fargate 是一个用于运行容器化应用程序的无服务器计算引擎，但题目并没有提到需要运行容器化服务，也不需要需要容器支持的复杂应用程序逻辑。因此不适合这种场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. AWS Fargate is a serverless computing engine for running containerized applications, but the title does not mention the need to run containerized services, nor does it require complex application logic that requires container support. Therefore it is not suitable for this scenario.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，可以处理突发请求模式（每秒 0 到 500 个），并与 Amazon API Gateway 完美集成以实现动态请求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service that can handle burst request patterns (0 to 500 per second) and is well integrated with Amazon API Gateway for dynamic requests.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一种无服务器 NoSQL 数据库，支持简单的键值查询模式，可以处理小于 1GB 的数据，并且具有高度可扩展性以适应未来的增长。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. Amazon DynamoDB is a serverless NoSQL database that supports a simple key-value query pattern, can handle less than 1GB of data, and is highly scalable for future growth.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。虽然 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 可以处理突发流量，但需要管理实例和操作系统，非常复杂，无法满足所讨论的 Serverless 架构的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Although Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling can handle burst traffic, it requires management of instances and operating systems, which is very complex and does not meet the requirements of the Serverless architecture in question.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 Amazon Aurora 是一种适合复杂查询和事务处理的关系数据库。不过，这道题只需要简单的键值查询，而且数据量较小（小于1GB）。 Aurora 太复杂而且昂贵。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Amazon Aurora is a relational database suitable for complex queries and transaction processing. However, this question only requires a simple key-value query, and the amount of data is small (less than 1GB). Aurora is too complex and expensive.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS Lambda；C. 亚马逊动态数据库
answer_text.en: B. AWS Lambda; C. Amazon DynamoDB

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确。 AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，可以处理突发请求模式（每秒 0 到 500 个），并与 Amazon API Gateway 完美集成以实现动态请求。；正确。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一种无服务器 NoSQL 数据库，支持简单的键值查询模式，可以处理小于 1GB 的数据，并且具有高度可扩展性以适应未来的增长。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service that can handle burst request patterns (0 to 500 per second) and is well integrated with Amazon API Gateway for dynamic requests.; Correct. Amazon DynamoDB is a serverless NoSQL database that supports a simple key-value query pattern, can handle less than 1GB of data, and is highly scalable for future growth.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司收集研究数据并与该公司世界各地的员工共享。该公司希望收集数据并将其存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中，并在 AWS 云中处理数据。公司将与公司员工共享数据。该公司需要 AWS 云中的安全解决方案来最大限度地减少运营开销。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company collects and shares research data with the company's employees all over the world. The company wants to collect and store the data in an Amazon S3 bucket and process the data in the AWS Cloud. The company will share the data with the company's employees. The company needs a secure solution in the AWS Cloud that minimizes operational overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数创建 S3 预签名 URL。指导员工使用该 URL。
A.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to create an S3 presigned URL. Instruct employees to use the URL.

B.zh: 为每个员工创建一个 IAM 用户。为每个员工创建 IAM 策略以允许 S3 访问。指导员工使用 AWS 管理控制台。
B.en: Create an IAM user for each employee. Create an IAM policy for each employee to allow S3 access. Instruct employees to use the AWS Management Console.

C.zh: 创建 S3 文件网关。创建用于上传的共享和用于下载的共享。允许员工在本地计算机上安装共享以使用 S3 文件网关。
C.en: Create an S3 File Gateway. Create a share for uploading and a share for downloading. Allow employees to mount shares on their local computers to use S3 File Gateway.

D.zh: 配置 AWS Transfer Family SFTP 终端节点。选择自定义身份提供商选项。使用 AWS Secrets Manager 管理用户凭证 指导员工使用 Transfer Family。
D.en: Configure AWS Transfer Family SFTP endpoints. Select the custom identity provider options. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the user credentials Instruct employees to use Transfer Family.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： S3 预签名 URL 允许临时访问 S3 对象，并且可以设置为过期以确保安全。正确：使用AWS Lambda自动生成URL，减少手动操作，降低运营开销。正确：员工只需通过URL即可访问数据，无需复杂的权限配置。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 pre-signed URLs allow temporary access to S3 objects and can be set to expire for security. Correct: Use AWS Lambda to automatically generate URLs, reducing manual operations and reducing operational overhead. Correct: Employees can access data simply through the URL, without complex permission configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：为每个员工创建 IAM 用户和策略会增加管理复杂性和运营开销。错误：使用 AWS 管理控制台访问数据可能无法满足便利性要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Creating IAM users and policies for each employee adds management complexity and operational overhead. Error: Accessing data using the AWS Management Console might not meet convenience requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3文件网关主要用于本地与S3之间的文件同步，不适合连接全球员工的共享数据。错误：需要额外的配置和维护，增加运营开销。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 file gateway is mainly used for file synchronization between local and S3, and is not suitable for connecting shared data of global employees. Error: Requires additional configuration and maintenance, increasing operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Transfer Family适合使用SFTP/FTP协议进行文件传输，非常复杂。 Bug：需要管理用户凭据和身份提供商，增加了运营开销。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Transfer Family is suitable for file transfer using SFTP/FTP protocol and is very complex. Bug: Requires management of user credentials and identity providers, increasing operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Lambda 函数创建 S3 预签名 URL。指导员工使用该 URL。
answer_text.en: A. Use an AWS Lambda function to create an S3 presigned URL. Instruct employees to use the URL.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (37%) C (37%) D (25%) 1。热门讨论与考点摘要： S3 预签名 URL 允许临时访问 S3 对象，并且可以设置为过期以确保安全。正确：使用AWS Lambda自动生成URL，减少手动操作，降低运营开销。正确：员工只需通过URL即可访问数据，无需复杂的权限配置。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (37%) C (37%) D (25%) 1. Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 pre-signed URLs allow temporary access to S3 objects and can be set to expire for security. Correct: Use AWS Lambda to automatically generate URLs, reducing manual operations and reducing operational overhead. Correct: Employees can access data simply through the URL, without complex permission configuration.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在构建新的家具库存应用程序。该公司已将该应用程序部署在跨多个可用区的一组 Amazon EC2 实例上。 EC2 实例在其 VPC 中的应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面运行。一位解决方案架构师观察到，传入流量似乎有利于一个 EC2 实例，从而导致某些请求出现延迟。解决方案架构师应该做什么来解决这个问题？
question_text.en: A company is building a new furniture inventory application. The company has deployed the application on a fleet ofAmazon EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones. The EC2 instances run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in their VPC. A solutions architect has observed that incoming traffic seems to favor one EC2 instance, resulting in latency for some requests. What should the solutions architect do to resolve this issue?

A.zh: 在 ALB 上禁用会话关联（粘性会话）
A.en: Disable session affinity (sticky sessions) on the ALB

B.zh: 将 ALB 替换为网络负载均衡器
B.en: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer

C.zh: 增加每个可用区中的 EC2 实例数量
C.en: Increase the number of EC2 instances in each Availability Zone

D.zh: 调整ALB目标组的运行状况检查频率
D.en: Adjust the frequency of the health checks on the ALB's target group

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：会话亲和性（粘性会话）导致流量倾向于分布到某些实例，而不是均匀分布到所有实例。这可能会导致某些实例过载，从而导致延迟问题。禁用会话亲和性可以让ALB根据流量负载动态分配请求，解决流量倾斜问题。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Session affinity (Sticky Sessions) causes traffic to tend to be distributed to certain instances rather than evenly distributed to all instances. This can cause some instances to become overloaded, causing latency issues. Disabling session affinity allows ALB to dynamically allocate requests based on traffic load and solve the traffic skew problem.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络负载均衡器（NLB）主要用于处理低延迟、高吞吐量的流量，但它不具有像ALB这样的高级功能（例如HTTP/HTTPS层的负载均衡）。问题的根本原因是会话粘滞，而不是负载均衡器类型选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network Load Balancer (NLB) is mainly used to handle low-latency, high-throughput traffic, but it does not have advanced features like ALB (such as load balancing at the HTTP/HTTPS layer). The root cause of the problem is sticky sessions, not the load balancer type selection.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：增加EC2实例数量可能会缓解负载问题，但并不能解决流量倾斜的根本原因。流量倾斜是由粘性会话引起的，而不是实例数量不足造成的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Increasing the number of EC2 instances may alleviate the load problem, but it does not solve the root cause of traffic skew. Traffic skew is caused by sticky sessions, not insufficient number of instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：调整运行状况检查频率并不能解决流量倾斜问题。运行状况检查的主要目的是确保实例可用性，而不是优化流量分配。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Adjusting the frequency of health checks does not solve the traffic skew problem. The main purpose of health checks is to ensure instance availability, not to optimize traffic distribution.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 ALB 上禁用会话关联（粘性会话）
answer_text.en: A. Disable session affinity (sticky sessions) on the ALB

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (88%) 13%。热门讨论与考点摘要：会话亲和性（粘性会话）导致流量倾向于分布到某些实例，而不是均匀分布到所有实例。这可能会导致某些实例过载，从而导致延迟问题。禁用会话亲和性可以让ALB根据流量负载动态分配请求，解决流量倾斜问题。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (88%) 13%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Session affinity (Sticky Sessions) causes traffic to tend to be distributed to certain instances rather than evenly distributed to all instances. This can cause some instances to become overloaded, causing latency issues. Disabling session affinity allows ALB to dynamically allocate requests based on traffic load and solve the traffic skew problem.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司的应用程序工作流程使用 AWS Lambda 函数从 Amazon S3 下载和解密文件。这些文件使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密钥进行加密。解决方案架构师需要设计一个解决方案，以确保正确设置所需的权限。哪种行动组合可以实现这一目标？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company has an application workflow that uses an AWS Lambda function to download and decrypt files from Amazon S3. These files are encrypted using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys. A solutions architect needs to design a solution that will ensure the required permissions are set correctly. Which combination of actions accomplish this? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将 kms:decrypt 权限附加到 Lambda 函数的资源策略
A.en: Attach the kms:decrypt permission to the Lambda function’s resource policy

B.zh: 在 KMS 密钥策略中授予 Lambda IAM 角色的解密权限
B.en: Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda IAM role in the KMS key's policy

C.zh: 在 KMS 密钥的策略中授予 Lambda 资源策略的解密权限。
C.en: Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda resource policy in the KMS key's policy.

D.zh: 使用 kms:decrypt 权限创建新的 IAM 策略并将该策略附加到 Lambda 函数。
D.en: Create a new IAM policy with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the policy to the Lambda function.

E.zh: 创建具有 kms:decrypt 权限的新 IAM 角色，并将执行角色附加到 Lambda 函数。
E.en: Create a new IAM role with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the execution role to the Lambda function.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 Lambda 函数资源策略不支持直接附加权限。需要通过 IAM 角色或 KMS 密钥策略授予权限。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Lambda function resource policies do not support attaching permissions directly. Permissions need to be granted through an IAM role or KMS key policy.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 KMS 密钥策略需要显式向 Lambda 的 IAM 角色授予解密权限，以便 Lambda 函数可以使用 KMS 密钥来解密文件。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The KMS key policy needs to explicitly grant decrypt permission to Lambda's IAM role so that the Lambda function can use the KMS key to decrypt the file.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 Lambda 函数的资源策略不直接与 KMS 密钥策略交互，因此无法通过这种方式授予权限。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. The Lambda function's resource policy does not interact directly with the KMS key policy, so permissions cannot be granted this way.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。尽管可以创建 IAM 策略并将其附加到 Lambda 函数，但这不足以让 Lambda 函数访问 KMS 密钥。还需要在 KMS 密钥策略中显式授予权限。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Although it is possible to create an IAM policy and attach it to a Lambda function, this is not enough to give the Lambda function access to the KMS key. Permissions also need to be explicitly granted in the KMS key policy.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 Lambda 函数需要执行角色，该角色必须包含 kms:decrypt 权限才能解密文件。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The Lambda function requires an execution role, which must contain kms:decrypt permission to decrypt files.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 KMS 密钥策略中授予 Lambda IAM 角色的解密权限；E. 创建具有 kms:decrypt 权限的新 IAM 角色，并将执行角色附加到 Lambda 函数。
answer_text.en: B. Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda IAM role in the KMS key's policy; E. Create a new IAM role with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the execution role to the Lambda function.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BE (81%) Other。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确。 KMS 密钥策略需要显式向 Lambda 的 IAM 角色授予解密权限，以便 Lambda 函数可以使用 KMS 密钥来解密文件。；正确。 Lambda 函数需要执行角色，该角色必须包含 kms:decrypt 权限才能解密文件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (81%) Other. Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. The KMS key policy needs to explicitly grant decrypt permission to Lambda's IAM role so that the Lambda function can use the KMS key to decrypt the file.; Correct. The Lambda function requires an execution role, which must contain kms:decrypt permission to decrypt files.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望监控其 AWS 成本以进行财务审查。云运营团队正在 AWS Organizations 管理账户中设计一个架构，以查询所有成员账户的 AWS 成本和使用情况报告。团队必须每月运行一次此查询并提供账单的详细分析。哪种解决方案是满足这些要求的最具可扩展性和成本效益的方式？
question_text.en: A company wants to monitor its AWS costs for financial review. The cloud operations team is designing an architecture in the AWS Organizations management account to query AWS Cost and Usage Reports for all member accounts. The team must run this query once a month and provide a detailed analysis of the bill. Which solution is the MOST scalable and cost-effective way to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在管理账户中启用成本和使用情况报告。向 Amazon Kinesis 发送报告。使用 Amazon EMR 进行分析。
A.en: Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver reports to Amazon Kinesis. Use Amazon EMR for analysis.

B.zh: 在管理账户中启用成本和使用情况报告。将报告发送到 Amazon S3 使用 Amazon Athena 进行分析。
B.en: Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3 Use Amazon Athena for analysis.

C.zh: 为成员账户启用成本和使用情况报告。将报告发送到 Amazon S3 使用 Amazon Redshift 进行分析。
C.en: Enable Cost and Usage Reports for member accounts. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3 Use Amazon Redshift for analysis.

D.zh: 为成员账户启用成本和使用情况报告。将报告发送给 Amazon Kinesis。使用 Amazon QuickSight 进行分析。
D.en: Enable Cost and Usage Reports for member accounts. Deliver the reports to Amazon Kinesis. Use Amazon QuickSight tor analysis.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Kinesis 是一种实时数据流服务，不适合处理静态月度报告。虽然使用 Amazon EMR 进行分析功能强大，但价格昂贵且复杂，而且并不是最具成本效益的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Kinesis is a real-time data streaming service and is not suitable for processing static monthly reports. While using Amazon EMR for analysis is powerful, it is expensive and complex, and is not the most cost-effective.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon S3 是存储成本和使用情况报告的最佳选择，支持高可扩展性和低成本存储。 Amazon Athena 是一种无服务器查询服务，支持直接查询 S3 中存储的数据。它价格便宜且易于使用，非常适合定期分析。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is the best choice for storing cost and usage reports, supporting high scalability and low-cost storage. Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that enables direct querying of data stored in S3. It is cheap and easy to use, making it ideal for regular analysis.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：为每个成员账户单独启用成本和使用情况报告会增加管理复杂性。 Amazon Redshift 是一种数据仓库服务，虽然功能强大，但价格昂贵，并且不适合处理简单的月度报告分析。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Enabling cost and usage reporting individually for each member account increases administrative complexity. Amazon Redshift is a data warehousing service that, while powerful, is expensive and not suitable for handling simple monthly reporting analysis.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：与选项 A 类似， Amazon Kinesis 不适合处理静态月度报告。 Amazon QuickSight 是一种可视化工具，虽然它适合显示数据，但不适合直接分析成本和使用情况报告。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Similar to option A, Amazon Kinesis is not suitable for processing static monthly reports. Amazon QuickSight is a visualization tool, and while it is suitable for displaying data, it is not suitable for direct analysis of cost and usage reports.

answer_text.zh: B. 在管理账户中启用成本和使用情况报告。将报告发送到 Amazon S3 使用 Amazon Athena 进行分析。
answer_text.en: B. Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3 Use Amazon Athena for analysis.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon S3 是存储成本和使用情况报告的最佳选择，支持高可扩展性和低成本存储。 Amazon Athena 是一种无服务器查询服务，支持直接查询 S3 中存储的数据。它价格便宜且易于使用，非常适合定期分析。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 is the best choice for storing cost and usage reports, supporting high scalability and low-cost storage. Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that enables direct querying of data stored in S3. It is cheap and easy to use, making it ideal for regular analysis.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在属于 AWS 云中 Auto Scaling 组的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行游戏应用程序。应用程序将使用UDP数据包传输数据。该公司希望确保应用程序可以随着流量的增加和减少而横向扩展和收缩。解决方案架构师应该怎样做才能满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run a gaming application on Amazon EC2 instances that are part of an Auto Scaling group in the AWS Cloud. The application will transmit data by using UDP packets. The company wants to ensure that the application can scale out and in as traffic increases and decreases. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将网络负载均衡器附加到 Auto Scaling 组。
A.en: Attach a Network Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.

B.zh: 将应用程序负载均衡器附加到 Auto Scaling 组。
B.en: Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.

C.zh: 使用加权策略部署 Amazon Route 53 记录集以适当路由流量。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon Route 53 record set with a weighted policy to route traffic appropriately.

D.zh: 将配置了端口转发的 NAT 实例部署到 Auto Scaling 组中的 EC2 实例。
D.en: Deploy a NAT instance that is configured with port forwarding to the EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：网络负载均衡器（NLB）支持UDP协议，这是题目中提到的一个关键要求。 NLB可以与Auto Scaling组集成，支持流量的动态扩缩容。该选项完全满足题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Network Load Balancer (NLB) supports UDP protocol, which is a key requirement mentioned in the title. NLB can be integrated with Auto Scaling groups to support dynamic expansion and contraction of traffic. This option fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 主要用于 HTTP 和 HTTPS 流量，不支持 UDP 协议。此选项不满足问题中的 UDP 要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Application Load Balancer (ALB) is primarily used for HTTP and HTTPS traffic and does not support UDP protocol. This option does not meet the UDP requirements in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Route 53 是一种 DNS 服务，可用于流量路由，但不能直接处理 UDP 数据包。该选项无法满足问题中负载均衡和Auto Scaling的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Route 53 is a DNS service that can be used for traffic routing but cannot handle UDP packets directly. This option cannot meet the requirements of load balancing and Auto Scaling in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： NAT 实例主要用于处理出站流量，而不是负载平衡。该选项不满足问题中的负载平衡和UDP要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: NAT instances are primarily used to handle outbound traffic, not load balancing. This option does not meet the load balancing and UDP requirements in the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 将网络负载均衡器附加到 Auto Scaling 组。
answer_text.en: A. Attach a Network Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：网络负载均衡器（NLB）支持UDP协议，这是题目中提到的一个关键要求。 NLB可以与Auto Scaling组集成，支持流量的动态扩缩容。该选项完全满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Network Load Balancer (NLB) supports UDP protocol, which is a key requirement mentioned in the title. NLB can be integrated with Auto Scaling groups to support dynamic expansion and contraction of traffic. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上为其不同品牌运营多个网站。每个网站每天都会生成数十 GB 的网络流量日志。解决方案架构师需要设计一个可扩展的解决方案，使公司的开发人员能够分析公司所有网站的流量模式。开发人员将在几个月内根据需要每周进行一次分析。该解决方案必须支持使用标准 SQL 的查询。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs several websites on AWS for its different brands. Each website generates tens of gigabytes of web traffic logs each day. A solutions architect needs to design a scalable solution to give the company's developers the ability to analyze traffic patterns across all the company's websites. This analysis by the developers will occur on demand once a week over the course of several months. The solution must support queries with standard SQL. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 将日志存储在 Amazon S3 中。使用 Amazon Athena 分析。
A.en: Store the logs in Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena tor analysis.

B.zh: 将日志存储在 Amazon RDS 中。使用数据库客户端进行分析。
B.en: Store the logs in Amazon RDS. Use a database client for analysis.

C.zh: 将日志存储在 Amazon OpenSearch Service 中。使用 OpenSearch Service 进行分析。
C.en: Store the logs in Amazon OpenSearch Service. Use OpenSearch Service for analysis.

D.zh: 将日志存储在 Amazon EMR 集群中 使用受支持的开源桶架进行基于 SQL 的分析。
D.en: Store the logs in an Amazon EMR cluster Use a supported open-source framework for SQL-based analysis.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon S3 是一种经济高效的存储解决方案，用于存储大量日志数据。正确： Amazon Athena 是一种无服务器查询服务，支持标准 SQL 并按查询付费，非常适合按需分析。该选项满足成本效益和按需分析的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is a cost-effective storage solution for storing large amounts of log data. Correct: Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that supports standard SQL and pays per query, making it ideal for on-demand analytics. This option meets the requirements of cost-effectiveness and on-demand analysis.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon RDS是适合结构化数据的数据库服务，但存储大量日志数据的成本较高。错误：数据库实例需要预配，无法按需扩容，维护成本高。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS is a database service suitable for structured data, but the cost of storing large amounts of log data is high. Error: The database instance needs to be provisioned, cannot be expanded on demand, and the maintenance cost is high.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon OpenSearch Service 主要用于搜索和分析日志数据，但不支持标准 SQL 查询。错误：该选项不满足问题所需的SQL查询要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon OpenSearch Service is primarily used for searching and analyzing log data, but does not support standard SQL queries. Error: This option does not meet the SQL query requirements required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon EMR 是适合复杂分析的大数据处理服务，但价格昂贵且需要集群维护。错误：此选项不符合成本效益要求的资格。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EMR is a big data processing service suitable for complex analysis, but it is expensive and requires cluster maintenance. Error: This option does not qualify as a cost-effective steroid.

answer_text.zh: A. 将日志存储在 Amazon S3 中。使用 Amazon Athena 分析。
answer_text.en: A. Store the logs in Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena tor analysis.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon S3 是一种经济高效的存储解决方案，用于存储大量日志数据。正确： Amazon Athena 是一种无服务器查询服务，支持标准 SQL 并按查询付费，非常适合按需分析。该选项满足成本效益和按需分析的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 is a cost-effective storage solution for storing large amounts of log data. Correct: Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that supports standard SQL and pays per query, making it ideal for on-demand analytics. This option meets the requirements of cost-effectiveness and on-demand analysis.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 国际公司为其运营所在的每个国家/地区都有一个子域。子域的格式为 example.com、country1.example.com 和country2.example.com。该公司的工作负载由应用程序负载均衡器支持。该公司希望对传输中的网站数据进行加密。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: An international company has a subdomain for each country that the company operates in. The subdomains are formatted as example.com, country1.example.com, and country2.example.com. The company's workloads are behind an Application Load Balancer. The company wants to encrypt the website data that is in transit. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 控制台请求顶级域 example com 的公共证书和 *.example.com 的通配符证书。
A.en: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public certificate for the apex top domain example com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 控制台请求顶级域 example.com 的私有证书和 *.example.com 的通配符证书。
B.en: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a private certificate for the apex top domain example.com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 控制台为顶级域 example.com 请求公有和私有证书。
C.en: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public and private certificate for the apex top domain example.com.

D.zh: 通过电子邮件地址验证域所有权。通过将所需的 DNS 记录添加到 DNS 提供商来切换到 DNS 验证。
D.en: Validate domain ownership by email address. Switch to DNS validation by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider.

E.zh: 通过将所需的 DNS 记录添加到 DNS 提供商来验证域的域所有权。
E.en: Validate domain ownership for the domain by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：以及 *.example.com 的通配符证书。正确的。公共证书适用于可公开访问的域名，合格证书可以覆盖所有子域（例如country1.example.com和country2.example.com）。这是满足问题要求的正确步骤。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com. Correct. Public certificates are for publicly accessible domain names, and qualified certificates can cover all subdomains (such as country1.example.com and country2.example.com). This is the correct step to fulfill the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：以及 *.example.com 的通配符证书。错误。私有证书通常用于内部应用程序服务，而不是可公开访问的域名。题目要求添加网站数据，需要公共证书。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com. mistake. Private certificates are typically used for internal application services rather than publicly accessible domain names. The question requires adding website data and requires a public certificate.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： example.com. 错误。题目没有提到需要私有证书，需要匹配的证书（*.example.com）。单纯申请高级域名证书不足以覆盖子域名。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: example.com.Error. The title doesn't mention that a private certificate is required, a matching certificate (*.example.com) is required. Simply applying for a high-level domain name certificate is not enough to cover subdomain names.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：提供者.错误。尽管电子接近验证是可选的，但该问题并未提及需要切换验证方法。直接使用DNS验证更符合问题要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: provider.Error. Although electronic proximity verification is optional, the question does not mention the need to switch verification methods. Directly using DNS verification is more in line with the problem requirements.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：通过将所需的 DNS 记录添加到您的 DNS 提供商来验证域的域所有权。正确的。 DNS验证是AWS推荐的域名所有权验证方法，适用于公共证书申请。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Verify domain ownership of the domain by adding the required DNS records to your DNS provider. Correct. DNS verification is the domain name ownership verification method recommended by AWS and is suitable for public certificate applications.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 控制台请求顶级域 example com 的公共证书和 *.example.com 的通配符证书。；E. 通过将所需的 DNS 记录添加到 DNS 提供商来验证域的域所有权。
answer_text.en: A. Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public certificate for the apex top domain example com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com.; E. Validate domain ownership for the domain by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： AE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：以及 *.example.com 的通配符证书。正确的。公共证书适用于可公开访问的域名，合格证书可以覆盖所有子域（例如country1.example.com和country2.example.com）。这是满足问题要求的正确步骤。；通过将所需的 DNS 记录添加到您的 DNS 提供商来验证域的域所有权。正确的。 DNS验证是AWS推荐的域名所有权验证方法，适用于公共证书申请。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com. Correct. Public certificates are for publicly accessible domain names, and qualified certificates can cover all subdomains (such as country1.example.com and country2.example.com). This is the correct step to fulfill the question requirements.; Verify domain ownership of the domain by adding the required DNS records to your DNS provider. Correct. DNS verification is the domain name ownership verification method recommended by AWS and is suitable for public certificate applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在其本地密钥管理器中使用加密密钥。由于监管和合规性要求，密钥管理器位于 AWS 云之外。该公司希望使用保留在 AWS 云外部并支持来自不同供应商的各种外部密钥管理器的加密密钥来管理加密和解密。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is required to use cryptographic keys in its on-premises key manager. The key manager is outside of the AWS Cloud because of regulatory and compliance requirements. The company wants to manage encryption and decryption by using cryptographic keys that are retained outside of the AWS Cloud and that support a variety of external key managers from different vendors. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用由 CloudHSM 集群支持的 AWS CloudHSM 密钥存储。
A.en: Use AWS CloudHSM key store backed by a CloudHSM cluster.

B.zh: 使用由外部密钥管理器支持的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 外部密钥存储。
B.en: Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) external key store backed by an external key manager.

C.zh: 使用默认的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 托管密钥存储。
C.en: Use the default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) managed key store.

D.zh: 使用由 AWS CloudHSM 集群支持的自定义密钥存储。
D.en: Use a custom key store backed by an AWS CloudHSM cluster.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：不满足“密钥存储在 AWS 外部”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The "Keys are stored outside of AWS" requirement is not met.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：完全满足题目要求，是AWS推荐的解决方案。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: It fully meets the question requirements and is the solution recommended by AWS.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：密钥存储在AWS中，不符合问题要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The key is stored in AWS and does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：密钥存储在AWS中，不符合问题要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The key is stored in AWS and does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用由外部密钥管理器支持的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 外部密钥存储。
answer_text.en: B. Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) external key store backed by an external key manager.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (95%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：完全满足题目要求，是AWS推荐的解决方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (95%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: It fully meets the question requirements and is the solution recommended by AWS.
